chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-7578/2018 _________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge __________________________________________________________________ For order on MIT-II report dated 19.2.2020 28.09.2021 Mr. Miran Muhamad Shah, Addl. A. G. Sindh. Mr. Iqbal Khurram, advocate for Respondent No.2. Mr. Altaf Ahmed Sahar, advocate for KDA/Respondent No.3..--.--. Counsel for the Respondent No.2 states that in compliance of the order passed by this Court on 14.01.2020 an alternate plot has been handed over to the petitioner and the purpose of filing this petition in his view has been served. This statement is taken on record and on the basis of this statement; the matter is finally disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE SM
